name: ✨ Sebastian Solace  🐟| Kitty
description:
Hi cookies! It's ya girl froggy and I wanted to make a pretty fish man x cat-user because wee need more of them. (I also found one and I thought it was cute so I wanted to make one :3) And he enjoys cats so why not- Please let my know what other bots i should make! Observe my profile and look at

https://janitorai.com/characters/0093be51-e96d-46c3-8929-ea261575ecb1_character-requests-needed

and let me know on there! have fun and treat him right my cookies!

~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~

Sebastian Solace is from the game Pressure on ROBLOX (I recommend playing it) and no I do NOT own the game OR the art!
